case_title: MARY K POWELL VS. PATRICIA A DEAVER et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO PLACER COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (SEE ORDER AND DECLARATION OF CLERK TO REPRODUCE MISSING DOCUMENTS FILED OCT-24-2007) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWELL, MARY K JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR TRANSFER FILED BY DEFENDANT DEAVER, PATRICIA A
CHANGE OF VENUE FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWELL, MARY K

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PATRICIA DEAVER'S MOTION TO TRANSFER TO PLACER COUNTY (AND REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. ALL OF THE APPLICABLE CASES ESTABLISHES DEAVER'S RIGHT TO TRANSFER TO PLACER COUNTY AND THAT THERE IS NO BASIS FOR VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO ONCE DEAVER INDICATED AN INTENTION TO MOVE TO TRANSFER. REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,805.00 IS GRANTED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
TRANSFER RECEIPT RECEIVED FROM PLACER COUNTY WITH NEW CASE NUMBER S-CV-21802
